name: Time Complexity Communication — Speaking Complexity Fluently

hook.what_you_will_build: Time Complexity Communication — Speaking Complexity Fluently

key_takeaways: Common complexities and their causes: O(1) hashmap, O(log n) binary search, O(n) single pass, O(n²) nested loop
Space complexity: count auxiliary structures, not input size
Amortized analysis: ArrayList.add() is O(1) amortized despite occasional O(n) resize
Best/worst/average: quicksort O(n log n) avg O(n²) worst — always mention when relevant
Trade-off language: 'We can reduce time to O(X) at the cost of O(Y) space'
reflection.next_topic_preview: Next: Common Patterns Review — final pattern drill.
